title: mitozus gracilipes
intro: Mitozus gracilipes, also known as the "Hairy Lip Fern", is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mitozus gracilipes include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into infusions or decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
